Jam—lows we um with (6002) v (—42%)man 9 - 7 e Z L (in m) humane lane manna my: Nae-MM wmsgm man man mum mm=wmm [ram—[Imus] -- 3 of 6 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART III—SEC. 4] THE NATIONAL HIGHWAYS AUTHORITY OF INDIA NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 13th January, 2010 The National Highways Authority of India (Recruitment, Seniority and Promotion) Amendment Regulations, 2010 N0.NHAI/11011/09/2009-HR.I. — In exercise of the powers conferred by section 35, read with section 9, of the National Highways Authority of India Act, 1988 (68 of I988), the National Highways Authority of India hereby makes the following regulations further to amend the National Highways Authority of India (Recruitment, Seniority and Promotion) Regulations, 1996, namely: — 1. (1) These regulations may be called the National Highways Authority of India (Recruitment, Seniority and Promotion) Amendment Regulations, 2010. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2 In the Schedule to the National Highways Authority of India (Recruitment, Seniority and Promotion) Regulations, 1996 (hereinafter referred to as the principal regulations), therSchedules prescribing the eligibility criteria and qualifications for the following posts shall be inserted; namely:- “Deputy General Manager (Legal) Manager (Legal)? 3. In the Schedule to the principal regulations, against the post of General Manager (Law), in column I, for the entry, the following entry shall be substituted, namely:- “Name of the post 1 General Manager (Legal)” K. S. MONEY, Member (Administration) [ADVT»III/4/122/09-Exty,] ExplanatoryMemorandum: Anything done or omitted to be done prior to notification of this amendment shall not be affected by promulgation of this amendment. ‘ FootNote: The principal regulations were published vide notification No.Nl-IARll201 17 1/95— Admn., dated llm March, 1996, in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part III, Section 4, dated the 11'h March, 1996 and last amended vide notification NONI-[All] l012/147/2009-HRJ, dated 23rd November, 2009, in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part III — Section 4, dated the 250' November, 2009. -- 4 of 6 -- [WIN—@1134] mwmzammnw Name of post No. of post Classification Pay Band and Method of recruitment of post Grade Pay/ Pay Scale (in Rs.) 1 2 3 4 5 Deputy General 2 (2009) Group A PB~3 Promotion / Deputation / Direct Manager (Legal) (Rs.l5600— Recruitment ’ 39 l 00) with Grade Pay Rs.7600 Age limit (in Educational and other qualifications In case of Promotion / Deputation / respect of direct required ' Direct Recruitment recruit only) 6 7 8 45 years Educational Qualification By promotion from amongst departmental Essential: A Degree in Law from a recognized University. Desirable: Master’s Degree in Law from a recognized University. Experience At least nine years experience in the field of Law/Legislative matters and well versed in legal obligations relating to contractual matters and arbitrations/ claims. / candidates holding the post of Manager (Legal) on a regular basis in NHAI for a period of at least 3 years and possessing the educational qualifications and experience stipulated in column 7. OR By deputation / direct recruitment from officers under the Central Government or State Governments or Union Territories or Universities or Recognized Research institutions or Public Sector Undertakings or Semi Government or Statutory or Autonomous Organizations and other Government Bodies: (i) holding analogous post in the pay scale of PB-3 (Rs.|5600-39100) with Grade Pay Rs.7600 (in CDA pattern) on regular basis; or (ii) with three years of regular service in the post carrying the pay scale of PB-3 (Rs.15600-39100) with Grade Pay Rsi6600 (in CDA pattern); and Possessing the educational qualifications and experience stipulated in column 7. Period of degutation Normally 4 years but may be extended/ curtailed with the approval of Competent Authority. l‘7e‘4’fllav'L -- 5 of 6 -- THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART III—SEC. 4] Classification Name of post No. of post Pay Band and Method of recruitment of post Grade Pay/ Pay Scale (in Rs.) 1 2 3 4 5 Manager (Legal) 4 (2009) Group A PB-3 Deputation / Direct Recruitment (Rs. 1 5600- 39100) with Grade Pay Rs.6600 Age limit (in Educational and other qualifications In case of Deputation I Direct respect of direct required Recruitment recruit only) 6 7 , 8 40 years Educational Qualification By deputation / direct recruitment from Essential: A Degree in Law from a recognized University. Desirable: Master’s Degree in Law from a recognized University. Experience At least six years experience in the field of Law/Legislative matters and well versed in legal obligations relating to contractual matters and arbitrations/ claims. officers under the Central Government or State Governments or Union Territories or Universities or Recognized Research Institutions or Public Sector Undertakings or Semi Government or Statutory or Autonomous Organizations rmd other Government Bodies: (i) holding analogous post in the pay scale of PB—3 (Rs.15600-39100) with Grade Pay Rs.6600 (in CDA pattern) on regular basis; or (ii) with three years of regular service in the post carrying the pay scale of PB-3 (Rs.15600-39100) with Grade Pay Rs.5400 (in CDA pattern); or (iii) with six years of regular service in the post carrying the pay scale of PB-Z (Rs.9300-34800) with Grade Pay Rs.4800 (in CDA pattern); and Possessing the educational qualifications and experience stipulated in column 7. Period of deputation Normally 3 years but may be extended/ curtailed with the approval of Competent Authority.
